title: Linked collectors and determiners for: Fungal 18S Ribosomal RNA (SSU) RefSeq Targeted Loci Project.
author: Bionomia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Natural history specimen data linked to collectors and determiners held within, "Fungal 18S Ribosomal RNA (SSU) RefSeq Targeted Loci Project". Claims or attributions were made on Bionomia by volunteer Scribes,  https://bionomia.net/dataset/3bfbda20-1a91-4cf9-992f-bc1e9e5b7dad  using specimen data from the dataset aggregated by the Global Biodiversity Information Facility,  https://gbif.org/dataset/3bfbda20-1a91-4cf9-992f-bc1e9e5b7dad . Formatted as a Frictionless Data package.
